top_signals.title: NEAR token jumps 30% amid AI hype, Arthur Hayes endorsement and scaling plans
top_signals.summary: The prominent crypto investor Arthur Hayes described NEAR, HYPE and ZEC as “the holy trinity” of altcoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The season finale economy: Why we undervalue the Premier League
top_signals.summary: With one round of Premier League fixtures remaining, the season finale is not approaching, it is here. Title races (usually) tighten, relegation battles become existential, and the casual viewer becomes a committed one. For fans, it is the most emotionally charged period of the year. For brands, it should be one of the most valuable [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
